/usr/bin/ar qc libbacktrader_core.a CMakeFiles/backtrader_core.dir/src/lineroot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backtrader_core.dir/src/linebuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backtrader_core.dir/src/lineseries.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backtrader_core.dir/src/comminfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backtrader_core.dir/src/position.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backtrader_core.dir/src/feed.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backtrader_core.dir/src/cerebro.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backtrader_core.dir/src/strategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backtrader_core.dir/src/order.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backtrader_core.dir/src/trade.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backtrader_core.dir/src/analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backtrader_core.dir/src/utils/date.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backtrader_core.dir/src/analyzers/sqn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backtrader_core.dir/src/analyzers/timereturn.cpp.o
